'''Polg''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] who was stationed on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Garos IV]].

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|2|Whispers in the Dark|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
